text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I spot Rice Shower in the plaza holding her head,
looking pained.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Oh, B-Big Brother... Don't worry. It's nothing...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Oh, B-Big Sister... Don't worry. It's nothing...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
To be honest, I've had a headache since this
morning. But I don't think it's a cold or anything.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I'm sure it'll get better soon. So don't worry.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I'm sure it'll get better soon. So don't worry.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Looks like Rice Shower's headache is really
bothering her. I wish there was something I could
do.
